query: SELECT t.id, t.name FROM tenants t WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pipelines p WHERE p.tenantId = t.id);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT t.id, t.name FROM tenants t WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pipelines p WHERE p.tenantId = t.id);
